entries.name: Anjali singh
entries.message: Grandpa, your love, wisdom, and warmth meant everything to me. I will always cherish the memories we shared. You will be deeply missed."

entries.name: Vishal Singh
entries.message: "To the man who taught me so much about life. I carry your lessons in my heart and hope to make you proud. Your memory is a treasure we will never lose."
